exercises.name: Straight Leg Crossover
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back, with one leg straight while the other is bent. Arms straight out to the sides at shoulder height.

2.Bring the bent leg straight, raising towards the ceiling then twist all the way on one side.

3.Hold for a duration of time, until you feel the stretch on hamstrings and glutes.

4.Return to starting position and switch.

exercises.name: Straight Leg Kickback
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, get into a 4-point position. 

2) From here, set your abdominals on and keep them tight throughout the exercise. 

3) Pick up one leg, squeeze your glutes as you push your heel back. 

4) Keep your abdominals on to prevent lower back sway. 

5) Return.

exercises.name: Straight Leg Windshield Wiper
exercises.description:
1. When performing this mobility exercise, keep your legs as extended as possible without straining our hamstrings and without forming an arch of your spine, throughout the exercise.

2. Lie down on an exercising mat.

3. Make a “T” shape of your upper body by extending your arms sideways. Raise your legs until they're perpendicular to the ground. This will be your starting position.

4. Raise your legs in an inclined/tilted manner such that both of your thighs are either touching each other or the lower one of them is touching the ground. Remember to exhale while you do this.

5. Pausing for a while, in a slow and controlled manner, turn to the other side.

exercises.name: Straight Leg Windshield Wiper
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on the mat, flat on your back. 

2. Extend your legs directly up into the air, while keeping the knees as straight as possible. 

3. While keeping the knees together, slowly lower your legs over to one side, then bringing them back up to the start position. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Strict Knees To Elbows
exercises.description:
1. Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, about shoulder-width apart. 

2. Contract your abdominals, bringing your hips up towards your ribs. 

3. Bend at the knees and drive your knees upwards until they come in contact with your elbows.

4. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Strict Ring Muscle Ups
exercises.description:
1. Set the rings shoulder-width apart, and grip them with a false grip (palms over the ring). 

2. Start hanging with arms fully extended. Pull your body up until the rings are at chest height. 

3. Move your chest over top of the rings, keeping your hands and elbows close to your body. 

4. Press yourself all the way up until your arms are fully extended. Return to the start position.

exercises.name: Strict Toes to Bar
exercises.description:
1. Start by gripping a pull up bar at around shoulder-width. 

2. Hang with straight arms and straight legs. Lift your feet towards the bar while pressing into the bar with straight arms. 

3. Contact the bar with both of your feet before slowly returning to the start position.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.description: Perform controlled, quick running strides, focusing on speed and rhythm.

exercises.name: Sumo decline leg press feet high
Sumo Heels Elevated Pulses
exercises.description:
Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart and your toes pointed slightly outward. Raise your heels off the floor so you’re balanced on the balls of your feet. 

Lower your hips into a sumo squat position, keeping your chest up and core engaged. From the bottom position, perform small controlled pulses up and down without letting your heels drop or fully standing up. 

Keep your movements steady and maintain tension in your legs throughout the exercise.

exercises.name: Sumo squat step outs
exercises.description: I like to use the front of a mat and back to know how far I am stepping back and forward. You do not need to have a mat.

exercises.name: Sumo Squat To Around The World
exercises.description: Sumo Squat To Around The World

exercises.name: Sumo Squat to Calf Raise
exercises.description:
Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart and toes pointing slightly outward. Lower your hips into a sumo squat, keeping your chest upright and knees tracking over your toes. 

From the bottom of the squat, press through your heels to rise and perform a calf raise, lifting your heels as high as possible while maintaining balance. 

Lower your heels back to the ground and repeat the sequence continuously.

exercises.name: Sumo squat with SA upright row
Super man banded lat pulls
exercises.description: Keep the band tight through the entire motion and pull shoulder blades back and down.

exercises.name: Super man SB holds
exercises.description: Hold up for a count of 5 , then release. That is 1 rep

exercises.name: Superband Anchored Alternating Leg Drops
exercises.description: Anchor the band above you. Lie on your back, holding the band, and alternately lower each leg toward the floor.

exercises.name: Superband Anchored Crunches
exercises.description: Anchor a superband above your head. Hold it with both hands and perform a crunch, pulling the band forward.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored Decline Chest Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point above head height, and standing inside the loop.

2. Grasp the band in both hands, with your hands up by your shoulders, in a "pushup" position. Slightly lean your torso forward.

3. With one foot forward, and one back, press your hands outwards and downwards until your arms are fully extended.

4. Return to the start position under control. Repeat.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored high-low woodchop
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing the band to an anchor point at head height or above.

2. Grabbing the band with both hands, and chest parallel to the band, bring the band downwards and across your body until it is down by your side furthest from the anchor. 

3.Return to starting position and repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Superband Anchored Leg Drops
exercises.description: Hold a superband anchored above. Lower both legs together toward the floor, keeping your core engaged.

exercises.name: Superband Anchored Low High Woodchop
exercises.description:
1.With feet about shoulder-width apart, place one foot inside the band, knees slightly bent, hands holding the band.

2.Raise the bands to the other side, twisting your upper torso and squaring your shoulders.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored Pistol Squat to Row
exercises.alternateName: single leg squat to row with band
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point at about chest height. 

2. While holding the band in both hands, do a pistol squat by sitting back into your hips, knees, and ankles on a single leg.

3. Return to the start position, then pull the handles towards your armpits, while keeping an "open chest" position. 

4. Repeat the pistol squat, and the row, until you've completed all the repetitions. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Superband Anchored Russian Twist
exercises.description: Anchor the band to the side. Sit and twist your torso side to side while holding the band taut.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored Single Arm Decline Chest Press
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point above head height.

2. Grasp the band in one hand, with your hand up by your shoulders, in a "pushup" position. Slightly lean your torso forward.

3. With one foot forward, and one back, press your hand outwards and downwards until your arm is fully extended.

4. Return to the start position under control. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored Squat to Row
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point at about chest height. 

2. While holding the band in both hands, do a squat by sitting back into your hips, knees, and ankles.

3. Return to the start position, then pull the handles towards your armpits, while keeping an "open chest" position. 

4. Repeat the squat, and the row, until you've completed all the repetitions.

exercises.name: Superband Anchored Toe Touches
exercises.description: Lie on your back with feet up. Hold a superband and reach toward your toes while engaging your core.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored Tricep Pushdown
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point above head height. 

2. Grasp the band in both hands, keeping your elbows by your sides. 

3. Extend your hands down towards the floor, while keeping your elbows in place. 

4. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: SuperBand Anchored Woodchop
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point at about chest height.

2. Stand with your chest parallel to the band, holding it in both hands, with feet shoulder-width apart. 

3. With arms extended, rotate your torso until you are facing away from the anchor point.

4. Return to the start position, and repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Superband Bent Over Row to Squat Jump
exercises.description:
Stand on a superband with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding the band handles with both hands. 

Hinge slightly at the hips and perform a row, pulling the band toward your torso and squeezing your shoulder blades together. 

Immediately transition into a squat, lowering down with control, then explosively jump up. 

Land softly, return to the squat, and repeat the movement continuously, keeping tension in the band throughout.

exercises.name: SuperBand Birddog
exercises.description:
1. Start on all fours, with the band looped around one foot and the opposite hand. 

2. Fully extend the leg and arm that hold the bands, without rocking side to side. 

3. Slowly return to the start position under control. Repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: SuperBand Broad Jump
exercises.description:
1. Start by securing a band to an anchor point at foot height. 

2. Place the band around your waist while standing facing away from the anchor. 

3. Attempt to jump forwards explosively, working against the band.

4. Land softly, step back towards the anchor point to reset and repeat.

exercises.name: Superband Chest Fly
exercises.description:
"Secure a resistance band behind your back, holding one end in each hand.

Stand tall, feet shoulder-width apart, and pull the band taut with arms extended in front of you.

Open your arms wide in a chest fly motion, keeping elbows slightly bent.
Slowly return to the starting position with control."

exercises.name: SuperBand Deadlift
exercises.description:
1. Start by looping the band around the centre of both your feet. You can double up the band for additional tension. 

2. With the ends of the band in both hands, reach your hips back with slightly bent knees and a long spine position.

3. Drive your hips forward to return to the start position and repeat.
